creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

Steps to reproduce:

1. Execute `gimp`
2. In menu: File -> New... 
3. Accept the defaults, click "OK"
4. In the tools window, choose "Text Tool" ("A") 
5. Click anywhere on the new image, text box appears, type in "foobar" or any other text
6. When done, try to move this new text box around, gimp will crash shortly
